description:
Hi team,

Frank Sutton from Tri-State Logistics here. the overnight tariff-classification data feed from the HTS reference service failed to sync, so the morning duty-rate batch came back empty. Need this restored before broker filings go out. Logs available. Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Frank
short_description: Tariff-classification data feed failed overnight sync

description:
Hi team,

Wendell Pierce from Tri-State Logistics here. users are getting an upload error when submitting USMCA certificates of origin through the compliance portal. The file accepts but validation returns a generic failure. Blocking pending shipments. Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Wendell
short_description: USMCA certificate upload error in compliance portal

description:
Hi team,

Kevin Tran from Tri-State Logistics here. the customs broker portal SSO is intermittently failing and staff are bounced back to the login page after authenticating. Affecting the whole import desk since this morning. Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Kevin
short_description: Customs broker portal SSO intermittent outage

description:
Hi team,

Samuel Ortega from Tri-State Logistics here. the duty-drawback report times out before it finishes generating for our quarterly entries. We need the full export for reconciliation. Not urgent but would like it this week. Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Samuel
short_description: Duty-drawback report times out on large entry set

description:
Hi team,

Lorraine Diaz from Tri-State Logistics here. the ACE entry-summary integration is rejecting line items with a schema validation error after the latest field mapping update. Need the mapping corrected so we can resume filings. Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Lorraine
short_description: ACE entry-summary integration rejecting line items

description:
Hi team,

Bernard Holt from Tri-State Logistics here. the barcode scanner at the receiving dock that feeds the import inventory system stopped registering scans into the trade-compliance database. Manual entry is slowing intake. Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Bernard
short_description: Receiving-dock scanner not feeding import inventory system

description:
Hi team,

Camille Royce from Tri-State Logistics here. the VPN tunnel to the trade-compliance shared drive keeps dropping, so documents can't be pulled reliably. Latency seems fine otherwise. Happy to run diagnostics on our end. Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Camille
short_description: VPN tunnel to trade-compliance shared drive dropping

description:
Hi team,

Michael Donnelly from Maumee Valley Foods here. the AES export filing submission is returning a gateway timeout when we transmit EEI records. Several shipments are waiting on confirmation. Can you check the connection to the filing service? Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Michael
short_description: AES export filing submission returning gateway error

description:
Hi team,

Karen Whitfield from Maumee Valley Foods here. the trade-compliance dashboard loads but the entry-summary widgets are blank for the current month. Historical data shows fine. Looks like the current-period query is failing. Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Karen
short_description: Trade-compliance dashboard not loading entry data

description:
Hi team,

Gerald Maddox from Maumee Valley Foods here. we stopped receiving the automated email notifications when an entry changes status. The events appear in the log but no email goes out. Affecting the whole compliance team. Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Gerald
short_description: Email notifications for entry status not sending

description:
Hi team,

Rachel Combs from Maumee Valley Foods here. after the HTS reference table updated, several of our saved classifications now show as invalid codes. Need to know if the codes were deprecated or if the mapping is wrong. Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Rachel
short_description: HTS reference table update broke saved classifications

description:
Hi team,

Diane Foster from Maumee Valley Foods here. the OCR on the document scanner is misreading values on commercial invoices, putting wrong amounts into the entry draft. We're catching them manually but it's error-prone. Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Diane
short_description: Document scanner OCR misreading invoice values

description:
Hi team,

Paul Kessler from Maumee Valley Foods here. the shared mailbox we use for broker correspondence stopped syncing on two workstations. New messages don't appear until a manual refresh. Started after the last update. Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Paul
short_description: Shared mailbox for broker correspondence not syncing

description:
Hi team,

Yolanda Pace from Maumee Valley Foods here. the reconciliation module is returning duplicate line items for entries flagged on value, which throws off the totals. Need this cleaned up before we file the recon entry. Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Yolanda
short_description: Reconciliation module returning duplicate line items

description:
Hi team,

Frank Sutton from Tri-State Logistics here. one of our analysts is locked out of the compliance portal after the password reset and the reset link returns an error. Need access restored, she's blocking three entries. Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Frank
short_description: User account locked out of compliance portal

description:
Hi team,

Wendell Pierce from Tri-State Logistics here. the network printer at the customs desk won't pull entry packets from the portal print queue. Other documents print fine. Jobs just sit in the queue and time out. Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Wendell
short_description: Printer at customs desk not pulling entry packets

description:
Hi team,

Kevin Tran from Tri-State Logistics here. an ACE ABI transmission was rejected with a mapping error referencing the importer of record field. Need the field mapping reviewed so we can retransmit the entry. Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Kevin
short_description: ACE ABI transmission rejected with mapping error

description:
Hi team,

Samuel Ortega from Tri-State Logistics here. two-factor codes for the broker portal aren't arriving by text for several users. They can't log in to release entries. Email codes work but text is the default. Please check. Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Samuel
short_description: Two-factor authentication codes not arriving

description:
Hi team,

Lorraine Diaz from Tri-State Logistics here. the bonded inventory report exports as a corrupt file that won't open in Excel. We need the report for a CBP request due this week. Can you regenerate or fix the export? Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Lorraine
short_description: Bonded inventory report export is corrupt

description:
Hi team,

Bernard Holt from Tri-State Logistics here. requesting access provisioning for two new compliance analysts to the AD/CVD case tracker, read access to our open Section 232 entries. No rush, end of week is fine. Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Bernard
short_description: New analyst access request for AD/CVD case tracker

description:
Hi team,

Camille Royce from Tri-State Logistics here. loading the historical entry archive has gotten very slow this week, 30 plus seconds per query. Current-year data is fine. Affecting our ability to pull support for audits. Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Camille
short_description: Slow performance loading historical entry archive

description:
Hi team,

Michael Donnelly from Maumee Valley Foods here. the compliance portal session times out after just a few minutes of inactivity, logging users out mid-entry. Can the timeout be extended for our team's accounts? Happy to share logs on a quick call.

Thanks,
Michael
short_description: Compliance portal session timing out too quickly
